body.title: [sprint] Purge all stale IMAP references — bus is PgBus; IMAP was removed a month ago but ~808 refs + dead code remain
body.description:
**Akien 2026-07-07: 'yank out ALL the references to IMAP — it's still confusing you a month later after taking it out.'** The live bus is PgBus (Postgres, unseen_university/devices/bus/pg_bus.py). IMAP was the OLD transport and was removed, but ~808 references remain (grep -rniIE imap, excl .venv/.git/runtime-memory-data) across LIVE code, docstrings, comments, tests, and config — a dual-path that repeatedly misleads CC (this session: I checked IMAP reachability when the bus is PgBus).

**Confirmed dead/stale (samples):** unseen_university/devices/bus/imap_server.py (IMAPServer); bus_launcher.py (imap_host, imap_port=143, 'waits for IMAP to respond', agentctl init); announce/idle_loop.py + listener.py idle_wait wording; device.py; tests/test_imap_idle.py, tests/test_bus.py, etc.; CLAUDE.md (FIXED this session).

**Decomposition (do in this order, verify PgBus green between each):**
1. MAP all refs by category: (a) dead IMAP code to delete, (b) stale docstrings/comments to rewrite to PgBus, (c) IMAP-only tests to delete, (d) LEGIT history ('IMAP replaced by PgBus') to KEEP, (e) any still-live IMAP path (should be none — verify).
2. Delete dead code (imap_server.py + IMAP branches in bus_launcher etc.) ONLY after proving PgBus is the sole live path.
3. Rewrite stale docstrings/comments to PgBus/poll reality.
4. Delete/rewrite IMAP tests.

**Affected files:** broad — unseen_university/devices/bus/*, announce/*, device.py, many tests. NOT the live PgBus code.
**Design rules:** never delete a live path; PgBus stays green (run bus/announce/granny tests between steps); preserve accurate 'IMAP was removed' history where it aids understanding.
**Completion test:** `grep -rniIE imap` over non-.venv/.git source returns only intentional historical mentions (or zero); bus/announce/granny test suites green.
**Scope boundary:** IMAP reference/deadcode removal. NOT a bus rewrite.
**intention:** I intend that no stale IMAP reference remains to mislead CC — the bus is unambiguously PgBus in code and docs.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
